data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to a failure in the LLM evaluation call.
data.assessment: The evidence indicates that the exploratory validation for the persona scenario is blocked because the LLM evaluation call failed, preventing any conclusive scoring. This is supported by multiple prior steps that also report similar issues with LLM evaluations, indicating a systemic problem rather than an isolated incident. As a result, no actionable insights or validations can be derived from this step.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic check
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Implement explicit endpoint + assertion contract for this exploratory requirement.
